review_comment: It would be better to check actual data version is correct or not.
You'd better add more checks on `map`.
You may check the actual content of global white lists.

It is awkward and error-prone to manually concatenate strings. Why not use JSON.toJsonString(this)?

Another thing, it would be better to omit the access secret part for safety reasons.
This toString is generated automatically by the editor I'm using, but for security reasons I've omitted the printing of SecretKey
